text.title: rag-implementation Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree for rag-implementation application; concludes with rule-id refs or skip.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the target vector store Chroma AND ingestion needs txt/md/pdf support?

branch.conclusion: Use this implementation with selectable chunker.
Layer agentic loop on top of plain rag, not on this pipeline.

example.description: Docs Q&A with mixed md + pdf on Chroma — use this implementation.
